sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Current objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 30:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check player position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check charcoal frames
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"\nCharcoal frame: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check bar
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 28:
        print(f"\nBar: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
